title: Old Lockgate Lookout
description: Tucked beside the old canal lock gate with a good view over the water. A quick find, good for a first-timer.
hint: Check behind the lower hinge, not inside the beam.

title: Sandstone Ridge Cache
description: Along the ridge path with a view across the Mersey. Bring boots, the last stretch gets muddy after rain.
hint: Base of the third waymarker post from the gate.

title: Pierhead Puzzle
description: A multi-stage cache. The listed address gets you to the start point, not the cache itself, work out the rest from there.
hint: The first clue is engraved, not printed.
